docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY CHUCK, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT REFIEETARY, SHIRLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUCK, DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REFIEETARY, SHIRLEY $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $608.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR AUG-02-2012; JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHIRLEY REFIEETARY FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $28.00 - SERVED NOV-11-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REFIEETARY, SHIRLEY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUCK, DOUGLAS
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2012 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-28-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JOSEPH AUSTRIA APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2012 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-14-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT STATES THAT SHE INTENDS TO FILE A MOTION TO VACATE. PARTIES AGREE THAT ORDER OF EXAMINATION CAN BE STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THE MOTION TO VACATE. JOSEPH AUSTRIA APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF(JC). APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEFENDANT IS WITHDRAWN. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT REFIEETARY, SHIRLEY HEARING SET FOR APR-26-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE SAM LAW FILED BY CHUCK, DOUGLAS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2012 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-02-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. JOE AUSTRIA APPEARED ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUCK, DOUGLAS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-30-2012 (SERVICE FEE $28.00) AS TO DEFENDANT REFIEETARY, SHIRLEY

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-26-2012 IS CONTINUED TO MAY-10-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH AUSTRIA--OFFICE ASSISTANT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAM LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUCK, DOUGLAS
